positive: A central, stylized silhouette illustration of a majestic grizzly bear sitting in front of a minimalist geometric forest scene. The bear should be drawn with bold, clean lines and strong, high-contrast details, reminiscent of Nordic folk art or vintage scientific engraving, but modernized. Use a restricted color palette of deep forest green, charcoal black, cream, and sepia tones. The composition must be perfectly centered, designed to look excellent when printed on a T-shirt or tote bag. Style details: Vector art, woodcut print quality, limited color palette, strong graphic elements, high saturation contrast, suitable for apparel print.
negative: blur, noise, grain, low detail, text, watermark, signature, logo, graffiti, dirty, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, abstract, realistic photography
